messages: 🌿 As Seen on Shark Tank India · Free Shipping Above ₹499 · Use code FRESH10 for 10% Off

settings.headline:
Stay Fresh
From Head
to Toe
settings.subtext: India's first whole-body deodorant cream. Long-lasting odour control with natural ingredients that nourish your skin — 24 hours, every day.

settings.headline: Every Benefit, Zero Compromise
settings.text: Formulated with care, tested with love. Here's what makes PureBody unlike anything you've used before.

features_grid.title: All-Day Odour Control
features_grid.text: Our formula eliminates odour-causing bacteria and keeps you fresh for 24+ hours. No midday reapplication, no awkward moments.

features_grid.title: Brightens Underarms
features_grid.text: Active botanicals reduce dark spots and visibly brighten over time. Freshness that looks as good as it feels.

features_grid.title: Soothes & Nourishes
features_grid.text: Enriched with Aloe Vera, Vitamin E and Shea Butter. No alcohol, no parabens. Gentle on every skin type.

features_grid.title: Whole-Body Formula
features_grid.text: Not just underarms — use on neck, chest, feet, inner thighs. One cream, full-body confidence.

features_grid.title: Clean Ingredients
features_grid.text: No aluminium, no triclosan, no synthetic fragrances. Only naturally-derived actives that are safe for daily use.

features_grid.title: Dermat Tested
features_grid.text: Clinically tested and dermatologist-approved for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

settings.headline: Pick Your Perfect Bundle
settings.subtext: More jars, more savings. All scents available in every pack.

reviews.name: Ananya S.
reviews.text: I've tried every natural deodorant on the market. PureBody is the first one that actually lasts all day. The Honey Oudh scent is luxurious — I get compliments constantly.

reviews.name: Neha R.
reviews.text: Game changer for summer. I use it everywhere — underarms, neck, even inner thighs. Zero irritation, beautiful smell, and my dark underarms are actually getting lighter.

reviews.name: Priya K.
reviews.text: As someone with sensitive skin, finding a natural deodorant that doesn't cause rashes was impossible until PureBody. The cream formula is so gentle yet so effective.

items.question: How long does it last?
items.answer: One application provides 24+ hours of odour protection. In humid or active conditions, you may want to reapply after 16-18 hours for maximum freshness.

items.question: Is it safe for sensitive skin?
items.answer: Yes! PureBody is dermatologist-tested, hypoallergenic, and free from aluminium, parabens, and synthetic fragrances. It's formulated with soothing ingredients like Aloe Vera and Shea Butter.

items.question: Can I use it on my whole body?
items.answer: Absolutely. PureBody is designed for whole-body use — underarms, neck, chest, inner thighs, feet, and anywhere else you want odour protection.

items.question: What about shipping and returns?
items.answer: Free shipping on orders above ₹499. We deliver pan-India within 4-7 business days. 30-day money-back guarantee — if you're not satisfied, we'll refund you completely.

settings.headline: Ready for All-Day Confidence?
settings.subtext: Join 10,000+ people who've made the switch to PureBody. Your skin will thank you.

settings.tagline: India's first whole-body deodorant cream. Clean ingredients, real results.
